name: Hot Apple Muffin
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and peel the apples, keeping them whole. Cut each one into 4 to 5 thick rings.
2. Mix the sugar and cinnamon together and coat the apple rings.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour and salt) in a mixing bowl.
4. In another bowl, beat the eggs, add the milk and melted butter. Stir the liquid very quickly into the flour mixture; do not beat and do not worry about lumps.
5. Fold in the chopped apples.
6. Fill 24 greased muffin tins or paper cases to one-third with the batter. Place one cinnamon apple ring on each muffin.
7. Bake in a preheated hot oven at 425°F for 15 to 25 minutes, until cooked. Remove from tins and serve hot.
